title: Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Nagpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd!
